meaning: n.[药]四咪唑,驱虫净(驱肠虫药)
examples: The preparation of tetramisole free alkali was studied with anti addition method.
The tetramisole molecular have optical activity. The traditional method is time and cost consuming to decide the rotatory direction and the value of optical rotatory.
Since Tetramisole Hydrochloride and Levamisole Hydrochloride have the same chemical structure, the preparation made of these two chemical materials have identical physicochemical properties.
